{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The owner of Snail Shell was known as the Origin of Corruption because they came from the Northwestern Hills and were good at creating bionic parts with corrupted flesh. However, they also stole this Snail Shell.
|affct=FAME
|hard=ATK
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=5189
|relic1=Sleeping Gypsy
|relic2=Gee Virus
|relic3=Paradise Lost
|relic4=Causality
|relic5=The Scream
}}
|color=blue
|earth=3
|water=3
|fire=4
|wind=4
|form=Zombie
|element=Earth
|realm=Koryeo
|orangehard= ATK
}}
